review1.name: Amine B.
review1.text: Best gym in Algiers! The equipment is modern and the coaches are truly professional.

review2.name: Lina K.
review2.text: I lost 15 kg in 4 months thanks to the personalized program. 100% recommended!

review3.name: Mehdi S.
review3.text: The group classes are amazing. The atmosphere is motivating and the hours are flexible.

review4.name: Ines R.
review4.text: Personal coaching changed the way I train. Visible results in just a few weeks.
